name: content-engine
description: Universal content repurposing system. Takes any raw content (podcast, webinar, video, blog, course) and outputs a complete multi-platform content ecosystem with hooks, calendars, engagement scoring, and brand voice enforcement.
author: KOINO Capital

source.description: Path to raw content file (transcript, blog post, video notes) or URL

brand_voice.description: Path to brand voice config file (see references/brand-voice-template.md)

output_dir.description: Output directory for all generated assets

outputs.clips/: Individual clip files with hook, body, CTA, platform variants
outputs.hook-vault-applied.md: Hook formulas applied to this specific content
outputs.engagement-scores.csv: Predicted engagement ranking for all clips
outputs.caption-variants.md: A/B caption variants for split testing
outputs.thumbnail-concepts.md: Visual concepts with text overlay suggestions
outputs.brand-voice-check.md: Brand consistency audit of all outputs
